title: Build a serverless image editing agent with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore harness
summary: This post walks through building a serverless image editor where users upload a photo, describe an edit in plain English, and receive the result in seconds. The agent runs on AgentCore harness without custom orchestration code. We deploy the full solution, including authentication, encrypted storage, three image editing tools, and a React frontend, with a single deployment command. The infrastructure is defined using AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK).
